title: Pan-Seared Canadian Bacon with Crisp Pear
description: A keto-friendly breakfast dish featuring pan-seared Canadian bacon and a sweet and crunchy pear.

ingredients.name: Crisp
ingredients.notes: Crispy fried shallots or onion rings

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add 2 slices of Canadian bacon and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned and crispy.
In a separate pan, cook the crispy fried shallots or onion rings until crispy.
Add the sliced pear to the pan with the crispy fried shallots or onion rings and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until caramelized.
Serve the pan-seared Canadian bacon with the sweet and crunchy pear and crispy fried shallots or onion rings.
